subject: Mathematics
chapter_name: Another Peek Beyond the Point (Solid Shapes)
overall_learning_objectives: Identify common 3D shapes in the environment
Recognize basic attributes: length, breadth, and height
Understand the concept of volume as space occupied by solids
Name standard solids: Cube, Cuboid, Sphere, Cylinder, Cone

lesson_plan.title: 2D vs 3D Shapes
teaching_strategy: Comparison of a square (paper) vs a cube (box)
student_activities: List 5 solid objects found in the school bag
Group activity: Sorting a box of mixed 2D/3D cutouts

lesson_plan.title: Exploring Basic Solids
topics_covered: Characteristics of Spheres, Cylinders, and Cones
Naming shapes based on their properties
